The Link Builder of AIESEC in Sri Lanka - get a shortened link by filling the form

This form can only be accessed using AIESEC emails.
The shortened links are available in your entity-specific sheet.
If you need to modify the link, you can resubmit your entries to overwrite the existing links.

For any questions or concerns, please reach out to dinuka.avinash@aiesec.net.

External or General Links:  click.aiesec.lk/<your-custom-link>
When creating External or General links, you can leave the entity field empty. This link can be seen by everyone.
Specific Links:  click.aiesec.lk/<entity>/<your-custom-link>
If you are creating entity-specific links, please choose your entity from the dropdown. This helps organize the links within the network and only the specific entity can see the shortened links.
Choosing an entity will reflect in the link, while leaving the field empty will generate a general link without the entity. Incase if you accidentally clicked an entity and if you would like create a External or General Link, you may choose the clear the section option.

• External or General Links:  click.aiesec.lk/<your-custom-link>

When creating External or General links, you can leave the entity field empty. This link can be seen by everyone.

  • Specific Links:  click.aiesec.lk/<entity>/<your-custom-link>

If you are creating entity-specific links, please choose your entity from the dropdown. This helps organize the links within the network and only the specific entity can see the shortened links.

Choosing an entity will reflect in the link, while leaving the field empty will generate a general link without the entity. Incase if you accidentally clicked an entity and if you would like create a External or General Link, you may choose the clear the section option.

click.aiesec.lk/<entity>/<link-keyword> 
Eg: click.aiesec.lk/mc/compendium or click,aiesec.lk/compendium
Do not repeat the click.aiesec.lk again. Only include hyphens, letters and numerical characters in short link, its CASE SENSITIVE 
DONT MESS AROUND WITH SHORT LINKS, THIS IS CONNECTED TO OTHER WEB SERVICES. (ONLY USE, HYPHENS, LETTERS, NUMBERS)
We recommend you to use lower case letters and avoid use hyphens instead of underscores.

click.aiesec.lk/<entity>/<link-keyword>
